mcp_servers.name: filesystem
mcp_servers.description: Read, write, and manage files and directories

mcp_servers.name: github
mcp_servers.description: GitHub API integration for repositories, issues, and PRs

mcp_servers.name: google-workspace-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Full natural language control over Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Tasks, and Contacts. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/taylorwilsdon/google_workspace_mcp, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) create Google Cloud OAuth Desktop credentials and enable Gmail/Drive/Calendar APIs, (4) update directory path in args.

mcp_servers.name: gmail-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Send, search, label, and manage Gmail messages and drafts. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/GongRzhe/Gmail-MCP-Server, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) create Google Cloud OAuth Desktop credentials and enable Gmail API, (5) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: outlook-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Read, search, send Outlook emails and manage calendar via Microsoft Graph. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/XenoXilus/outlook-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) register Azure AD app at portal.azure.com (App registrations > New registration > add Mail.Read/Send, Calendars.ReadWrite permissions), (5) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: ms-teams-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Post messages and manage channels in Microsoft Teams via Azure Entra ID. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/InditexTech/mcp-teams-server, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) register Azure AD app with Teams permissions, (5) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: courier-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Send notifications across email, SMS, Slack, and push channels via Courier API. Get API key from courier.com.

mcp_servers.name: line-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Official LINE Bot MCP (npm, no git clone) — send messages, stickers, and images via LINE Messaging API using @line/line-bot-mcp-server. Easier setup than line-mcp-alt. Get Channel Access Token and Channel Secret from LINE Developers Console (developers.line.biz).

mcp_servers.name: wechat-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Publish Markdown articles to WeChat Official Accounts. Get App ID and Secret from mp.weixin.qq.com (requires a registered WeChat Official Account).

mcp_servers.name: slack-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Official Anthropic Slack MCP — post messages, list channels, and search Slack workspaces via the @modelcontextprotocol/server-slack npm package. No git clone needed. Create a Slack app at api.slack.com/apps, add scopes (channels:read, chat:write, channels:history, groups:read), install to workspace to get Bot Token. Team ID is visible in the Slack URL.

mcp_servers.name: discord-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Basic Discord MCP — send and read messages via Discord Bot. Simpler than discord-mcp-full; use this for straightforward message send/read. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/v-3/discordmcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args. Create Discord bot at discord.com/developers/applications and copy the Bot Token.

mcp_servers.name: discord-mcp-full
mcp_servers.description: Full-featured Discord MCP — message CRUD, role management, and guild info. More capabilities than discord-mcp; use this when you need role/guild management. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/aj-geddes/discord-agent-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args. Create bot at discord.com/developers/applications.

mcp_servers.name: twilio-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Send SMS/MMS, make voice calls, and access 1,400+ Twilio API endpoints. Get Account SID, API Key and Secret from console.twilio.com.

mcp_servers.name: whatsapp-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Send and receive WhatsApp messages via the official Cloud API. Get Access Token and Phone Number ID from Meta for Developers (developers.facebook.com > WhatsApp > Getting Started).

mcp_servers.name: zoom-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Manage Zoom meetings, users, and recordings via Zoom API. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/echelon-ai-labs/zoom-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) create Zoom OAuth Server-to-Server app at marketplace.zoom.us, (5) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: twitter-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main Twitter/X MCP (vidhupv/x-mcp) — post tweets, search timelines, and manage Twitter/X account via API. Use this as the primary option. Get API Keys from developer.twitter.com (Basic plan required for write access).

mcp_servers.name: twitter-mcp-alt
mcp_servers.description: Alternative Twitter/X MCP (DataWhisker) — extends twitter-mcp with replies, deletes, and image uploads; choose this if you need those extra actions. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/DataWhisker/x-mcp-server, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: reddit-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main Reddit MCP (netixc) — retrieve posts, comments, search queries, and saved content via Reddit OAuth. Requires Reddit app credentials. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/netixc/reddit-mcp-server, (2) run uv sync in the folder, (3) update the path in args, (4) create Reddit app at reddit.com/prefs/apps to get credentials.

mcp_servers.name: reddit-mcp-anon
mcp_servers.description: Anonymous Reddit MCP (karanb192) — browse posts and comments without any credentials. Alternative to reddit-mcp when you only need read-only public access. No API key needed.

mcp_servers.name: insta-business-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main Instagram MCP (jlbadano) — post images and manage Instagram business account via official Facebook Graph API. More stable than insta-mcp; requires a Facebook Developer App. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/jlbadano/ig-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) create Facebook App at developers.facebook.com with instagram_basic and pages_show_list permissions, (5) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: insta-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Alternative Instagram MCP (arjun1194/insta-mcp) — full account control via username/password login; no Facebook Developer App needed unlike instagram-mcp, but uses unofficial access which may break. No API key needed.

mcp_servers.name: facebook-mcp-server
mcp_servers.description: Automate Facebook page posting, moderation, and analytics via Facebook Graph API. Get Page Access Token from developers.facebook.com.

mcp_servers.name: facebook-ads-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Create and manage Facebook/Meta ad campaigns with reporting. Get Meta User Access Token from developers.facebook.com with ads_management and ads_read permissions.

mcp_servers.name: tiktok-mcp
mcp_servers.description: TikTok video analysis and content access via TikNeuron API. Get API key from tikneuron.com.

mcp_servers.name: tiktok-ads-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Manage TikTok ad campaigns, budgets, and performance metrics. Get App credentials from business.tiktok.com > Developer > App Management.

mcp_servers.name: youtube-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main YouTube MCP (ZubeidHendricks) — manage videos, transcripts, channels, and playlists via YouTube Data API v3. Use this as the primary option. Get API key from Google Cloud Console (enable YouTube Data API v3).

mcp_servers.name: youtube-mcp-transcript
mcp_servers.description: Alternative YouTube MCP (space-cadet/yt-mcp) — focused on transcript and metadata extraction. Use instead of youtube-mcp if transcript extraction is your primary need. Get API key from Google Cloud Console (enable YouTube Data API v3).

mcp_servers.name: bilibili-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main Bilibili MCP (wangshunnn) — browse and search Bilibili video content without authentication. Use this as the primary option. No API key required.

mcp_servers.name: bilibili-mcp-full
mcp_servers.description: Alternative Bilibili MCP (34892002/bilibili-mcp-js) — extended access including video searching and detail retrieval. Use instead of bilibili-mcp if you need richer video detail data. No API key required.

mcp_servers.name: tencentcloud-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Bridges AI code generation and cloud deployment for Tencent Cloud apps. Get Secret ID and Key from console.cloud.tencent.com > Access Management.

mcp_servers.name: google-drive-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Browse, read, and manage files and folders in Google Drive. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/isaacphi/mcp-gdrive, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) create Google Cloud OAuth Desktop credentials and enable Drive API, (5) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: google-keep-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Find, create, update, and manage Google Keep notes. Get Google Master Token via gkeepapi docs: https://gkeepapi.readthedocs.io/en/latest/#obtaining-a-master-token. PREREQ: install uv (pip install uv).

mcp_servers.name: google-calendar-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Create, update, and manage Google Calendar events and schedules. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/galacoder/mcp-google-calendar, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) create Google Cloud OAuth credentials and enable Calendar API, (5) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: apple-notes-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main Apple Notes MCP (arslankhanali) — read and write Apple Notes via AppleScript. Use this as the primary option. macOS ONLY — will not work on Windows.

mcp_servers.name: onenote-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Access OneNote notebooks, create pages, and search notes. No API key — uses Microsoft device code auth on first run. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/danosb/onenote-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: icloud-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Manage iCloud files and notes via AppleScript. macOS ONLY — will not work on Windows.

mcp_servers.name: linear-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Create and update Linear issues, cycles, and project tracking. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/joshduffy/mcp-servers, (2) navigate to linear folder, (3) npm install and npm run build, (4) get Linear API Key from linear.app/settings/api, (5) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: personalization-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Stores user preferences and personalizes agent responses over time. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/YangLiangwei/PersonalizationMCP, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: notion-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Official Notion integration for reading and writing databases and pages. Get API Key from notion.so/my-integrations (create an internal integration and share your pages with it).

mcp_servers.name: obsidian-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main Obsidian MCP (cyanheads/obsidian-mcp-server) — full CRUD access to a local Obsidian vault via Local REST API plugin. More feature-rich than obsidian-mcp-simple. PREREQ: install the Local REST API plugin inside Obsidian and enable it — the plugin will show you the API key and base URL.

mcp_servers.name: todoist-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Official Todoist integration for managing tasks, projects, and labels. Get API Token from todoist.com/app/settings/integrations/developer.

mcp_servers.name: jira-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Create, update, and query Jira issues and sprints via Atlassian API. Get API Token from id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens.

mcp_servers.name: alpaca-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Execute stock and crypto trades, get account info, and stream market data via Alpaca. Get API Key and Secret from alpaca.markets (paper trading available for free).

mcp_servers.name: robinhood-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Trade stocks and options and view portfolio data via Robinhood. Get credentials from your Robinhood account.

mcp_servers.name: alpha-vantage-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Fetch stocks, forex, crypto, and economic indicators via Alpha Vantage. Get free API key from alphavantage.co.

mcp_servers.name: yahoo-finance-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Retrieve stock prices, historical data, market dashboards, and portfolio reports from Yahoo Finance. No API key required. PREREQ: install uv (pip install uv).

mcp_servers.name: mcp-finance
mcp_servers.description: Multi-source finance data aggregator for stocks, news, and fundamentals. No API key required. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/nimitmk7/mcp-finance, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: tradingview-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Real-time crypto and stock market analysis with technical pattern detection and indicators via TradingView. No API key needed (uses public data). PREREQ: install uv (pip install uv).

mcp_servers.name: sec-edgar-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Search and retrieve SEC filings, 10-K/10-Q reports, and company data. No API key required (public EDGAR).

mcp_servers.name: octagon-sec-mcp
mcp_servers.description: AI-powered SEC filing analysis and financial intelligence. Get API key from octagonai.com.

mcp_servers.name: polymarket-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Trade and query prediction markets on Polymarket via API. Get API key from polymarket.com.

mcp_servers.name: prediction-markets-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Read public prediction market data from Polymarket and Kalshi (read-only). No API key required. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/JamesANZ/prediction-market-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: kalshi-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Trade and query regulated prediction markets on Kalshi. Get API Key and RSA key from kalshi.com/account/api.

mcp_servers.name: binance-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Fetch spot prices, account balances, and place orders on Binance. Get API Key and Secret from binance.com > Account > API Management.

mcp_servers.name: bybit-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Trade futures/spot and query market data on Bybit exchange. Get API Key and Secret from bybit.com > Account > API. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/dlwjdtn535/mcp-bybit-server, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: hyperliquid-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Trade perpetual futures on Hyperliquid DEX. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/TradingBalthazar/hyperliquid-mcp-server-v6, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: okx-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Fetch cryptocurrency price data from OKX exchange (read-only). No API key required for public price data.

mcp_servers.name: coingecko-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Get crypto prices, market caps, and trending coins via CoinGecko API. No API key required (public API).

mcp_servers.name: coinmarketcap-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Fetch crypto market data and rankings via CoinMarketCap API. Get free API key from coinmarketcap.com/api.

mcp_servers.name: defillama-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Query DeFi protocol TVL, yields, and chain analytics from DefiLlama. No API key required (public API).

mcp_servers.name: dexpaprika-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Fetch DEX trading pairs, prices, and liquidity data across chains. No API key required (public API).

mcp_servers.name: funding-rates-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Monitor futures funding rates across major crypto exchanges. No API key required (public exchange data).

mcp_servers.name: fear-greed-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Fetch the Crypto Fear & Greed Index for market sentiment analysis. No API key required (public index).

mcp_servers.name: crypto-indicators-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Calculate technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands) for crypto. No API key required (public data).

mcp_servers.name: etf-flow-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Track Bitcoin and crypto ETF inflows and outflows. No API key required (public data).

mcp_servers.name: crypto-portfolio-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Manage and track cryptocurrency portfolio performance. Get API key from the service provider.

mcp_servers.name: crypto-sentiment-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Analyze social media and market sentiment for cryptocurrencies. Get API key from the service provider.

mcp_servers.name: ynab-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Read budgets, transactions, and category balances from YNAB. Get Personal Access Token from app.ynab.com/settings/developer.

mcp_servers.name: actual-budget-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Query and update transactions in a self-hosted Actual Budget instance. No API key required (local instance). SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/s-stefanov/actual-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: lunchmoney-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Manage transactions and budgets in Lunchmoney personal finance app. Get API key from my.lunchmoney.app/developers.

mcp_servers.name: xero-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Manage invoices, contacts, and accounting data via Xero OAuth. Register an app at developer.xero.com to get Client ID and Secret.

mcp_servers.name: postgresql-mcp
mcp_servers.description: PostgreSQL database access with schema inspection, query tuning, and index analysis. Set DATABASE_URI to your connection string (postgresql://user:password@host:5432/dbname). PREREQ: uv installed (pip install uv).

mcp_servers.name: stripe-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Create charges, manage customers, and query Stripe payment data. Get Secret Key from dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys.

mcp_servers.name: hass-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Streamlined Home Assistant MCP (voska/hass-mcp, uvx install) — query device states, control entities, and manage automations. Easiest to install via uvx; use this as the default HA option. Get long-lived token from HA: Profile > Security > Long-Lived Access Tokens. PREREQ: install uv (pip install uv).

mcp_servers.name: home-assistant-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Alternative Home Assistant MCP (tevonsb) — control lights, switches, and automations. Similar to hass-mcp but requires git clone; use if hass-mcp doesn't work for your HA version. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/tevonsb/homeassistant-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args. Get long-lived token from HA Profile > Security > Long-Lived Access Tokens.

mcp_servers.name: advanced-ha-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Advanced Home Assistant MCP (jango-blockchained) — goes beyond hass-mcp and home-assistant-mcp with scripting, automation creation/editing, and full device management. Use this when you need to create or edit automations, not just trigger them. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/jango-blockchained/advanced-homeassistant-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args. Get long-lived token from HA Profile.

mcp_servers.name: iot-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Control local IoT devices over MQTT or HTTP on a home network. No API key needed (local network). SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/jordy33/iot_mcp_server, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: esp-rainmaker-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Control ESP RainMaker IoT devices via AI. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/espressif/esp-rainmaker-mcp, (2) run 'uv run esp-rainmaker-cli login' once to store credentials, (3) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: whoop-mcp
mcp_servers.description: WHOOP recovery, sleep, strain, and biometric data. NOTE: this server runs as a local HTTP/SSE server on port 3000, not stdio. You must run it separately: git clone https://github.com/JedPattersonn/whoop-mcp, bun install, then bun run start. Connect to it at http://localhost:3000/mcp via HTTP transport instead.

mcp_servers.name: oura-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main Oura Ring MCP (rajvirtual) — access sleep, activity, and readiness scores. Use this as the primary option. Get Personal Access Token from cloud.ouraring.com/personal-access-tokens. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/rajvirtual/oura-mcp-server, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: apple-health-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Analyze Apple Health exports for steps, sleep, heart rate, and workouts. macOS ONLY — will not work on Windows.

mcp_servers.name: open-wearables-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Self-hosted platform unifying wearable health data (Apple Health, Samsung Health Connect, Garmin, Polar, Suunto, Whoop) into one AI-ready API with a built-in MCP server. SETUP REQUIRED: git clone https://github.com/the-momentum/open-wearables, then docker compose up. Access MCP via the local server after setup.

mcp_servers.name: garmin-mcp-alt
mcp_servers.description: Garmin Connect MCP (eddmann) — 22 tools for activities, health/sleep/HRV, training analysis, activity comparison, write support (log health data, manage weight), MCP resources and prompts. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/eddmann/garmin-connect-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args. Uses Garmin Connect credentials.

mcp_servers.name: fitbit-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Fetch Fitbit activity, sleep, and heart rate data via Fitbit OAuth. Register an app at dev.fitbit.com to get Client ID and Secret.

mcp_servers.name: playwright-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Official Microsoft Playwright MCP — automate any browser, fill forms, click, screenshot, scrape any website. Use this as the primary option. No API key needed.

mcp_servers.name: firecrawl-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Crawl and scrape any website into clean Markdown — use this for news sites (CNN, BBC, Straits Times, etc.) by passing their URLs. Sign up at firecrawl.dev for a free API key.

mcp_servers.name: browserbase-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Cloud browser automation with persistent sessions via BrowserBase. Sign up at browserbase.com to get API key and project ID.

mcp_servers.name: google-scholar-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Search and retrieve academic papers from Google Scholar. No API key needed. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/JackKuo666/Google-Scholar-MCP-Server, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: google-maps-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main Google Maps MCP (Garblesnarff) — location search, directions, places, and distance matrix. Use this as the primary option. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/Garblesnarff/google-maps-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args. Get API key from console.cloud.google.com (enable Maps, Places, Directions APIs).

mcp_servers.name: google-flights-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main Google Flights MCP (opspawn) — search flight prices and schedules via Google Flights public data. Use this as the primary option. No API key needed. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/opspawn/Google-Flights-MCP-Server, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: google-flights-mcp-alt
mcp_servers.description: Alternative Google Flights MCP (smamidipaka6) — same Google Flights public data with a different implementation. Use if google-flights-mcp doesn't work for your setup. No API key needed. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/smamidipaka6/flights-mcp-server, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: amadeus-hotels-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Search and book hotels via Amadeus Hotel APIs. Get API Key and Secret from developers.amadeus.com (free test account available).

mcp_servers.name: booking-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Booking.com accommodation search and booking integration. Get API key from booking.com developer portal.

mcp_servers.name: agoda-api-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Universal GraphQL/REST API-to-MCP bridge from Agoda — auto schema introspection, DuckDB SQL post-processing, recipe caching. Requires OpenAI API key plus target API auth. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/agoda-com/api-agent, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: openweathermap-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Fetch current weather and forecasts via OpenWeatherMap API. Get free API key from openweathermap.org/api.

mcp_servers.name: spotify-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main Spotify MCP (varunneal) — control playback, search music, and manage playlists. Use this as the primary option. Requires Spotify Premium. Register an app at developer.spotify.com to get Client ID and Secret.

mcp_servers.name: spotify-mcp-full
mcp_servers.description: Alternative Spotify MCP (marcelmarais) — extends spotify-mcp with queue management and recommendations; choose this if you need queue control or recommendation features. Requires Spotify Premium. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/marcelmarais/spotify-mcp-server, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args. Register app at developer.spotify.com.

mcp_servers.name: netflix-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Query Netflix-style content catalog and get AI-powered show recommendations. No API key (uses local dataset). SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/AshutoshRavindraIwale/Netflix_Context_agent, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: twitch-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Fetch live stream info, channel data, and clips from Twitch API. Get App ID and Secret from dev.twitch.tv/console.

mcp_servers.name: steam-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Browse Steam game library, reviews, and player statistics. Get Web API Key from steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey.

mcp_servers.name: soundcloud-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Search and retrieve SoundCloud tracks and playlists via public API. No API key required.

mcp_servers.name: video-extraction-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Extract and analyze video content using vision models. Requires OpenAI API key for vision analysis. Get key from platform.openai.com.

mcp_servers.name: what2watch-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Get real-time TV schedules and free streaming channel recommendations. Requires email magic link auth. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/lio1204/what2watch-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: plex-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Browse and control your Plex media server library and playback. Get Plex Token from app.plex.tv/desktop > Account > Plex Web > request token.

mcp_servers.name: jellyfin-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Browse and control an open-source Jellyfin self-hosted media server. No API key required (local server). SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/ag2-mcp-servers/jellyfin-api, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: elevenlabs-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Official ElevenLabs MCP — TTS, voice cloning, audio transcription, and conversational AI agents. Get API key from elevenlabs.io.

mcp_servers.name: mcp-tts
mcp_servers.description: Multi-provider text-to-speech: ElevenLabs, Google TTS, and OpenAI TTS in one server. Requires API key for chosen provider.

mcp_servers.name: minimax-mcp
mcp_servers.description: TTS, image generation, and video generation via MiniMax AI APIs. Get API key from minimaxi.com.

mcp_servers.name: ffmpeg-mcp-advanced
mcp_servers.description: Advanced FFmpeg MCP (dubnium0) — 40+ tools for video/audio processing, analysis, and streaming. Most feature-rich of the FFmpeg options; use when you need advanced processing or streaming. No API key (local FFmpeg). PREREQ: FFmpeg installed. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/dubnium0/ffmpeg-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: mcp-video-converter
mcp_servers.description: Convert video, audio, and image files between formats (MP4, WebM, MOV, MP3, PNG). No API key (local FFmpeg). PREREQ: FFmpeg installed. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/adamanz/mcp-video-converter, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: mcp-media-processor
mcp_servers.description: Node.js MCP for video and image processing operations. No API key (local FFmpeg). PREREQ: FFmpeg installed.

mcp_servers.name: easyocr-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Local OCR via EasyOCR — supports multiple languages, no API key required. PREREQ: Python and easyocr package installed. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/WindoC/easyocr-mcp, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: gemini-ocr-mcp
mcp_servers.description: OCR powered by Google Gemini — extract text from images and base64-encoded data. Get API key from aistudio.google.com.

mcp_servers.name: mistral-ocr-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Document OCR via Mistral OCR API for high-accuracy text extraction from images and PDFs. Get API key from console.mistral.ai.

mcp_servers.name: openai-ocr-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Text extraction from images via OpenAI vision models. Get API key from platform.openai.com.

mcp_servers.name: amazon-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main Amazon MCP (fewsats) — search Amazon products and complete purchases via Fewsats micropayments. Requires a Fewsats API key. Get API key from fewsats.com.

mcp_servers.name: ebay-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Comprehensive eBay Sell APIs — inventory, orders, marketing, analytics (325 tools). Get access token from developer.ebay.com.

mcp_servers.name: etsy-mcp-server
mcp_servers.description: Main Etsy MCP (georgejeffers) — manage listings, shop details, shipping profiles, and image uploads. Use this as the primary option. Get API key from developer.etsy.com.

mcp_servers.name: shopify-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Manage Shopify store products, orders, customers, and inventory. Get Access Token from partners.shopify.com or your store admin > Apps > Private apps.

mcp_servers.name: bitwarden-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Securely retrieve credentials from Bitwarden vault. PREREQ: Bitwarden CLI must be installed and unlocked. Run 'bw unlock --raw' in terminal and paste the output as BW_SESSION. Download CLI from bitwarden.com/help/cli.

mcp_servers.name: sentry-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Query errors, performance issues, and release health data from Sentry. Get Auth Token from sentry.io/settings/account/api/auth-tokens.

mcp_servers.name: kubernetes-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Manage Kubernetes clusters, pods, deployments, and services. PREREQ: kubectl configured with a valid kubeconfig. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/containers/kubernetes-mcp-server, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: onepassword-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Retrieve credentials and secrets from 1Password via service account token. Get Service Account Token from 1password.com/settings/service-accounts.

mcp_servers.name: shodan-mcp-full
mcp_servers.description: Full-featured Shodan MCP (ADEOSec) — extends shodan-mcp with CVE lookup and vulnerability scanning. Use this when you need vuln/CVE data on top of device search. Get API key from shodan.io/dashboard. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/ADEOSec/mcp-shodan, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: virustotal-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Scan files, URLs, and IPs for malware and threats via VirusTotal. Get free API key from virustotal.com.

mcp_servers.name: cloudflare-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Manage Cloudflare Workers, DNS, KV store, R2, and analytics via official MCP. Get API Token from dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens.

mcp_servers.name: aws-s3-mcp
mcp_servers.description: List buckets, read, write, and delete objects in AWS S3. Set AWS credentials via environment variables or AWS credentials file.

mcp_servers.name: kali-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Access Kali Linux security tools for authorized penetration testing. Requires a local Kali Linux instance.

mcp_servers.name: splunk-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Search Splunk logs, run SPL queries, and manage alerts and dashboards. Get API Token from your Splunk instance settings. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/splunk/splunk-mcp-server2, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: figma-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Official Figma MCP — read design files and extract components via the official Figma MCP server. Use this as the primary option. Get Personal Access Token from figma.com > Account Settings > Personal access tokens.

mcp_servers.name: figma-context-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Alternative Figma MCP (GLips/Figma-Context-MCP) — provides design context and layout data specifically tailored for AI coding assistants. Use instead of figma-mcp if you're feeding design data into code generation workflows. Get Personal Access Token from figma.com > Account Settings > Personal access tokens. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/GLips/Figma-Context-MCP, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: replicate-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Run any of Replicate's 1,000+ AI models including image, video, and audio. Get API Token from replicate.com/account/api-tokens.

mcp_servers.name: stability-ai-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Generate, edit, and upscale images using Stability AI's Stable Diffusion models. Get API key from platform.stability.ai.

mcp_servers.name: huggingface-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Run inference on thousands of HuggingFace-hosted AI models. Get API Token from huggingface.co/settings/tokens.

mcp_servers.name: canva-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Create designs, edit templates, and manage brand assets via Canva API. Get API key from canva.com/developers.

mcp_servers.name: drawio-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Official Draw.io MCP (jgraph/@drawio/mcp, npm) — open, create, and edit diagrams directly in the draw.io desktop editor. Official package, easiest to install. No API key required.

mcp_servers.name: drawio-mcp-alt
mcp_servers.description: Alternative Draw.io MCP (Sujimoshi) — programmatically create and edit diagrams node-by-node with batch operations. Use when you want Claude to build diagram structure from scratch (add_nodes, link_nodes, edit_nodes, remove_nodes, get_diagram_info). Outputs .drawio.svg files compatible with VSCode draw.io extension. No API key required. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/Sujimoshi/drawio-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: photoshop-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Interface with Adobe Photoshop via Python API for AI-driven image editing and workflow automation. PREREQ: Adobe Photoshop installed. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/loonghao/photoshop-python-api-mcp-server, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: gimp-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Integrate AI models with GIMP for open-source image editing and manipulation. PREREQ: GIMP installed. No API key required. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/libreearth/gimp-mcp, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: imagegen-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Text-to-image and image-to-image editing via OpenAI DALL-E 2/3 and gpt-image-1. Get API key from platform.openai.com.

mcp_servers.name: blender-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Base Blender MCP (ahujasid) — connect Claude to Blender for 3D modeling with PolyHaven assets, Sketchfab models, AI model generation (Hyper3D/Hunyuan3D), viewport screenshots, and remote host support. Use this for asset-heavy creative work. PREREQ: Blender installed + Blender addon from repo. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/ahujasid/blender-mcp, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) install Blender addon, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: blender-mcp-full
mcp_servers.description: Full-featured Blender MCP (poly-mcp) — 51 tools with complete 3D workflow automation, boolean ops, materials, and modifiers. More powerful than blender-mcp; use when you need advanced material/modifier control. PREREQ: Blender installed + Blender addon from repo. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/poly-mcp/Blender-MCP-Server, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) install Blender addon, (5) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: blender-mcp-local
mcp_servers.description: Local-AI Blender MCP (dhakalnirajan) — controls Blender via Ollama local models instead of external APIs. Use this if you want fully offline/local AI-driven 3D modeling with no API costs. PREREQ: Blender + Ollama + Blender addon from repo. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/dhakalnirajan/blender-open-mcp, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: posthog-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Query PostHog product analytics events, funnels, and feature flags. Get API key from app.posthog.com/settings.

mcp_servers.name: mixpanel-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Analyze Mixpanel user behavior, funnels, and retention cohorts. Get API Key from mixpanel.com/settings/project. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/moonbirdai/mixpanel-mcp-server, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: amplitude-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Search Amplitude charts, dashboards, and experiment results. Get API key from analytics.amplitude.com/settings/api-keys. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/silviorodrigues/amplitude-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: uspto-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Search patents, trademarks, and IP data across 6 USPTO data sources (51 tools). No API key required (public USPTO API). SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/riemannzeta/patent_mcp_server, (2) pip install -r requirements.txt, (3) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: deepl-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Translate text and documents with high-quality neural translation (500K chars/month free). Get API key from deepl.com/pro-api.

mcp_servers.name: canvas-lms-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Main Canvas LMS MCP (DMontgomery40) — interact with courses, assignments, and grades via 54 tools. Use this as the primary option. Get API Token from your Canvas instance > Account > Settings > Approved Integrations.

mcp_servers.name: canvas-lms-mcp-alt
mcp_servers.description: Alternative Canvas LMS MCP (vishalsachdev) — Canvas integration for students and instructors with a different implementation. Use if canvas-lms-mcp doesn't work for your setup. SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/vishalsachdev/canvas-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args. Get API Token from your Canvas instance > Account > Settings > Approved Integrations.

mcp_servers.name: anki-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Create, review, and manage Anki flashcard decks. PREREQ: Anki desktop app must be open with AnkiConnect add-on installed (add-on code 2055492159 from ankiweb.net).

mcp_servers.name: zillow-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Scrape Zillow for property listings, home values, and rental prices. No API key required (web scraping). SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/sap156/zillow-mcp-server, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: real-estate-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Analyze local real estate data and property comparables. No API key required (local data). SETUP REQUIRED: (1) git clone https://github.com/agentic-ops/real-estate-mcp, (2) npm install, (3) npm run build, (4) update path in args.

mcp_servers.name: brightdata-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Web scraping and data extraction via BrightData's proxy network — scrape any website including real estate listings. Get API token from brightdata.com (5,000 requests/month free).

mcp_servers.name: puppeteer
mcp_servers.description: Browser automation and web scraping

mcp_servers.name: brave-search
mcp_servers.description: Web search using Brave Search API

mcp_servers.name: google-maps
mcp_servers.description: Google Maps API for location services
